name: opencode-go
description: OpenCode Go — $5 first month, $10/month. 11 curated open coding models across 2 API formats. The same key is used for both OpenAI and Anthropic groups.
keyInstructions: Subscribe to OpenCode Go at https://opencode.ai/auth, then copy your API key. The same key is used for both the OpenAI and Anthropic groups.
